title: OpoMutation
description: Standardized OPO Mutation Language for deterministically writing data to ERPs

entity.description: The target OPO entity type, e.g. 'Customer', 'Invoice'

action.description: The CRUD action to perform on the entity

filter.description: Filter to select which records to UPDATE or DELETE. Required for UPDATE and DELETE.

payload.description: The data to be inserted (CREATE) or modified (UPDATE). Required for CREATE and UPDATE.
